`; } /** * printSlip — 新しいタブで給与明細を開き印刷ダイアログを起動 */ function printSlip(emp, rec, result, yearMonth, clientName) { const html = buildSlipHTML(emp, rec, result, yearMonth, clientName); const blob = new Blob([html], { type: "text/html;charset=utf-8" }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const win = window.open(url, "_blank"); // フォールバック: ポップアップブロック対策 if (!win) { const a = document.createElement("a"); a.href = url; a.download = `給与明細_${emp.name}_${yearMonth}.html`; a.click(); } setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 30000); } // ─── 2. 全銀フォーマット生成 ─────────────────────────────────── // 全銀フォーマット仕様 (総合振込 / レコード長120桁 固定長テキスト) function padRight(str, len, char) { char = char || " "; str = String(str || ""); return (str + char.repeat(len)).slice(0, len); } function padLeft(str, len, char) { char = char || "0"; str = String(str || ""); return (char.repeat(len) + str).slice(-len); } // カタカナ変換（全角のみ許可） const KANA_MAP = { "ア":"ｱ","イ":"ｲ","ウ":"ｳ","エ":"ｴ","オ":"ｵ", "カ":"ｶ","キ":"ｷ","ク":"ｸ","ケ":"ｹ","コ":"ｺ", "サ":"ｻ","シ":"ｼ","ス":"ｽ","セ":"ｾ","ソ":"ｿ", "タ":"ﾀ","チ":"ﾁ","ツ":"ﾂ","テ":"ﾃ","ト":"ﾄ", "ナ":"ﾅ","ニ":"ﾆ","ヌ":"ﾇ","ネ":"ﾈ","ノ":"ﾉ", "ハ":"ﾊ","ヒ":"ﾋ","フ":"ﾌ","ヘ":"ﾍ","ホ":"ﾎ", "マ":"ﾏ","ミ":"ﾐ","ム":"ﾑ","メ":"ﾒ","モ":"ﾓ", "ヤ":"ﾔ","ユ":"ﾕ","ヨ":"ﾖ", "ラ":"ﾗ","リ":"ﾘ","ル":"ﾙ","レ":"ﾚ","ロ":"ﾛ", "ワ":"ﾜ","ヲ":"ｦ","ン":"ﾝ", "ガ":"ｶﾞ","ギ":"ｷﾞ","グ":"ｸﾞ","ゲ":"ｹﾞ","ゴ":"ｺﾞ", "ザ":"ｻﾞ","ジ":"ｼﾞ","ズ":"ｽﾞ","ゼ":"ｾﾞ","ゾ":"ｿﾞ", "ダ":"ﾀﾞ","ヂ":"ﾁﾞ","ヅ":"ﾂﾞ","デ":"ﾃﾞ","ド":"ﾄﾞ", "バ":"ﾊﾞ","ビ":"ﾋﾞ","ブ":"ﾌﾞ","ベ":"ﾍﾞ","ボ":"ﾎﾞ", "パ":"ﾊﾟ","ピ":"ﾋﾟ","プ":"ﾌﾟ","ペ":"ﾍﾟ","ポ":"ﾎﾟ", "ァ":"ｧ","ィ":"ｨ","ゥ":"ｩ","ェ":"ｪ","ォ":"ｫ", "ッ":"ｯ","ャ":"ｬ","ュ":"ｭ","ョ":"ｮ", "ー":"ｰ","「":"｢","」":"｣","・":"･","。":"｡","、":"､", }; function toHankakuKana(str) { return String(str || "").split("").map(c => KANA_MAP[c] || c).join(""); } function toHankaku(str) { return toHankakuKana(String(str || "")) .replace(/[Ａ-Ｚａ-ｚ０-９]/g, c => String.fromCharCode(c.charCodeAt(0) - 0xFEE0)) .toUpperCase() .replace(/[^A-Z0-9 ｦ-ﾟ()\/\-]/g, " "); } // 銀行コード・支店コード（本来は銀行マスタから引くが、ここでは入力値をそのまま使う） function getBankCode(bankName) { // 主要行の簡易マッピング（統合時に銀行マスタDBと差し替え） const MAP = { "三菱UFJ": "0005", "みずほ": "0001", "三井住友": "0009", "りそな": "0010", "ゆうちょ": "9900", "楽天": "0036", "PayPay": "0033", "auじぶん": "0039", }; for (const [key, code] of Object.entries(MAP)) { if ((bankName || "").includes(key)) return code; } return "0000"; // 不明の場合は 0000（統合時に要対応） } /** * generateZengin — 全銀フォーマット文字列を生成してダウンロード * @param {Array} payData - [{emp, rec, result}] の配列 * @param {object} clientInfo - {name, bankCode, branchCode, accountType, accountNo, accountName} * @param {string} yearMonth - "2025-03" */ function generateZengin(payData, clientInfo, yearMonth) { const [year, month] = yearMonth.split("-"); const today = new Date(); const dateStr = String(today.getFullYear()).slice(-2) + padLeft(today.getMonth() + 1, 2) + padLeft(today.getDate(), 2); const transferDate = year.slice(-2) + padLeft(month, 2) + "25"; // 支払日: 25日固定（設定可能に拡張予定） // ヘッダーレコード（120桁） const header = [ "1", // データ区分 (1桁) "21", // 種別コード: 総合振込 (2桁) "0", // コード区分: 銀行コード (1桁) padLeft(clientInfo.bankCode || "0000", 4), // 振込元銀行コード (4桁) padRight("", 15), // 振込元銀行名 (15桁) — 省略 padLeft(clientInfo.branchCode || "000", 3),// 振込元支店コード (3桁) padRight("", 15), // 振込元支店名 (15桁) — 省略 "1", // 預金種目 (1桁) 1=普通 2=当座 padLeft(clientInfo.accountNo || "0000000", 7), // 口座番号 (7桁) padRight(toHankaku(clientInfo.accountName || ""), 40), // 依頼人名 (40桁) transferDate, // 振込指定日 (6桁) YYMMDD padRight("", 17), // 予備 (17桁) ].join(""); const lines = [header.slice(0, 120)]; let totalCount = 0; let totalAmount = 0; // データレコード（従業員1件につき1行、120桁） for (const { emp, result } of payData) { if (!emp.bank || !emp.bank.bankName) continue; const netPay = Math.round(result.netPay); if (netPay <= 0) continue; const acType = emp.bank.accountType === "当座" ? "2" : "1"; const acNo = padLeft(emp.bank.accountNo || "0000000", 7); const acName = padRight(toHankaku(emp.nameKana || emp.name), 30); const bankCode = padLeft(getBankCode(emp.bank.bankName), 4); const branchCode = padLeft(emp.bank.branchCode || "001", 3); // 支店コードは別途入力 const record = [ "2", // データ区分 (1桁) bankCode, // 被仕向銀行番号 (4桁) padRight("", 15), // 被仕向銀行名 (15桁) — 省略 branchCode, // 被仕向支店番号 (3桁) padRight("", 15), // 被仕向支店名 (15桁) — 省略 padRight("", 4), // 手形交換所番号 (4桁) — 空白 acType, // 預金種目 (1桁) acNo, // 口座番号 (7桁) acName, // 受取人名 (30桁) padLeft(netPay, 10), // 振込金額 (10桁) "0", // 新規コード (1桁) padRight("", 10), // EDI情報 (10桁) — 省略 ].join("").slice(0, 120); lines.push(padRight(record, 120)); totalCount++; totalAmount += netPay; } // トレーラーレコード（120桁） const trailer = padRight([ "8", padLeft(totalCount, 6), padLeft(totalAmount, 12), padRight("", 101), ].join(""), 120); lines.push(trailer.slice(0, 120)); // エンドレコード（120桁） const endRecord = padRight("9" + padRight("", 119), 120); lines.push(endRecord.slice(0, 120)); const content = lines.join("\r\n"); const blob = new Blob([content], { type: "text/plain;charset=shift-jis" }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement("a"); a.href = url; a.download = `zengin_${yearMonth.replace("-", "")}.txt`; a.click(); setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 10000); return { totalCount, totalAmount }; } // ─── 3. 勤怠詳細入力モーダル ─────────────────────────────────── function AttendanceDetailModal({ employee, record, onSave, onClose }) { const sal = employee.salary || {}; const scheduledDays = Number((employee.payrollSettings || {}).scheduledWorkDays || sal.scheduledDays || 22); const scheduledHrs = Number(sal.workHoursPerDay || 8); const [form, setForm] = useState({ // 所定労働 scheduledDays: record.scheduledDays ?? scheduledDays, workHoursPerDay: record.workHoursPerDay ?? scheduledHrs, scheduledDaysAvg: record.scheduledDaysAvg ?? 20, scheduledHrsMonth: record.scheduledHrsMonth ?? (scheduledDays * scheduledHrs), scheduledHrsAvg: record.scheduledHrsAvg ?? 160, // 出欠勤 workDays: record.workDays ?? scheduledDays, absenceDays: record.absenceDays ?? 0, lateTime: record.lateTime ?? 0, earlyLeaveTime: record.earlyLeaveTime ?? 0, leaveAbsenceDays: record.leaveAbsenceDays ?? 0, preRetireDays: record.preRetireDays ?? 0, attendanceDays: record.attendanceDays ?? 0, // 実働時間 totalWorkHours: record.totalWorkHours ?? 0, overtimeHours: record.overtimeHours ?? 0, // 法定外残業 lateNightHours: record.lateNightHours ?? 0, holidayWorkHrs: record.holidayWorkHrs ?? 0, // 所定休日 legalHolidayHrs: record.legalHolidayHrs ?? 0, // 法定休日 over60Hrs: record.over60Hrs ?? 0, // 60時間超 actualWorkHours: record.actualWorkHours ?? 0, // 休暇 paidLeaveDays: record.paidLeaveDays ?? 0, // その他控除 otherDeductions: record.otherDeductions || [], }); // 後方互換: 旧フィールド名 holidayHours -> holidayWorkHrs if (record.holidayHours && !record.holidayWorkHrs) { form.holidayWorkHrs = record.holidayHours; } function set(k, v) { setForm(p => ({ ...p, [k]: v })); } function addDeduction() { set("otherDeductions", [...form.otherDeductions, { id: `od${Date.now()}`, label: "", amount: 0 }]); } function updDeduction(id, k, v) { set("otherDeductions", form.otherDeductions.map(d => d.id === id ? { ...d, [k]: v } : d)); } function delDeduction(id) { set("otherDeductions", form.otherDeductions.filter(d => d.id !== id)); } const preview = calcPayroll(employee, form, Number(employee.residentTax || 0)); const numInp = { ...PR.inp, textAlign: "right", padding: "5px 8px", fontFamily: "'DM Mono'" }; const SL = { fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, color: "#475569", marginBottom: 8, paddingBottom: 4, borderBottom: "1px solid #F1F5F9" }; function Row({ label, k, unit, step = 0.5, readOnly = false }) { return (
{label}
!readOnly && set(k, Number(e.target.value))} readOnly={readOnly} style={{ ...numInp, width: 72, background: readOnly ? "#F8F9FA" : "#FAFCFF", color: readOnly ? "#94A3B8" : "#1A1A2E" }} /> {unit}
); } return (
勤怠入力 — {employee.name}
{employee.dept} · {employee.empType}
{/* 所定労働 */}
所定労働
{/* 出欠勤 */}
出欠勤
{/* 実働時間 */}
実働時間
{/* 休暇 */}
休暇
その他控除
{form.otherDeductions.map(d => (
updDeduction(d.id, "label", e.target.value)} placeholder="社宅費など" style={{ ...PR.inp, flex: 2, fontSize: 11 }} /> updDeduction(d.id, "amount", Number(e.target.value))} style={{ ...PR.inp, flex: 1, fontSize: 11, textAlign: "right" }} /> 円
))} {form.otherDeductions.length === 0 && (
なし
)}
{/* リアルタイム試算 */}
今月の給与試算
{[ ["支給合計", preview.grossPay, "#16A34A"], ["時間外手当", preview.otPay, "#3B82F6"], ["欠勤控除", preview.absDeduct, "#D97706"], ["健康保険", preview.healthIns, "#64748B"], ["厚生年金", preview.pension, "#64748B"], ["雇用保険", preview.empIns, "#64748B"], ["所得税", preview.incomeTax, "#64748B"], ["住民税", preview.residentTax, "#64748B"], ["控除合計", preview.totalDeductions, "#D97706"], ].map(([l, v, c]) => (
{l}
¥{fmt(v)}
))}
差引支給額 ¥{fmt(preview.netPay)}
); } // ─── 4. 給与確定時 タスク自動生成 ────────────────────────────── /** * confirmAndAutoTask — 給与を確定し laborTasks に自動タスクを追加する * @param {object} client - migratePlans 済みのクライアントオブジェクト * @param {function} updateClient - Reactの状態更新関数 * @param {string} yearMonth - "2025-03" * @param {Array} records - 当月の勤怠・計算レコード群 * @param {string} staffId - 担当スタッフID（タスクのassigneeに設定） * @returns {Array} 追加されたタスクの配列 */ function confirmAndAutoTask(client, updateClient, yearMonth, records, staffId) { const [year, month] = yearMonth.split("-"); const payDayRaw = (client.payrollSettings || {}).payDay || 25; const payDay = String(payDayRaw).padStart(2, "0"); // 翌月の振込日を計算 const nextMonth = Number(month) === 12 ? `${Number(year) + 1}-01` : `${year}-${String(Number(month) + 1).padStart(2, "0")}`; const dueDate = `${nextMonth}-${payDay}`; // 1. 振込確認タスク（社労士→自分） const taskTransfer = { id: `t_pay_${Date.now()}`, title: `${year}年${month}月分 給与振込確認（${yearMonth}分）`, status: "todo", assigneeType: "staff", assigneeId: staffId || "s1", dueDate: dueDate, domainId: "payroll", memo: `振込合計: ¥${fmt(records.reduce((s, r) => { const emp = (client.employeeList || []).find(e => e.id === r.employeeId); if (!emp) return s; return s + calcPayroll(emp, r, Number(emp.residentTax || 0)).netPay; }, 0))} / ${records.length}名`, createdAt: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), autoGenerated: true, sourceModule: "payroll", }; // 2. 明細送付タスク（クライアント担当者への連絡依頼） const mainContact = (client.clientContacts || []).find(c => c.mainContact) || (client.clientContacts || [])[0]; const taskSlip = mainContact ? { id: `t_slip_${Date.now() + 1}`, title: `${year}年${month}月分 給与明細の送付`, status: "todo", assigneeType: "staff", assigneeId: staffId || "s1", dueDate: dueDate, domainId: "payroll", memo: `明細を各従業員に配布・送付してください（${records.length}名分）`, createdAt: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), autoGenerated: true, sourceModule: "payroll", } : null; // 3. 社保納付タスク（翌月末が納付期限） const socialInsDate = `${nextMonth}-${String(new Date(Number(nextMonth.split("-")[0]), Number(nextMonth.split("-")[1]), 0).getDate()).padStart(2, "0")}`; const taskSocial = { id: `t_ins_${Date.now() + 2}`, title: `${year}年${month}月分 社会保険料納付確認`, status: "todo", assigneeType: "staff", assigneeId: staffId || "s1", dueDate: socialInsDate, domainId: "payroll", memo: "健康保険・厚生年金・雇用保険の各納付を確認してください", createdAt: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), autoGenerated: true, sourceModule: "payroll", }; const newTasks = [taskTransfer, taskSlip, taskSocial].filter(Boolean); // laborTasks に追記（既存の自動生成タスクは上書き） updateClient(c => ({ ...c, payrollMonths: [ ...(c.payrollMonths || []).filter(m => m.yearMonth !== yearMonth), { id: `pm_${Date.now()}`, yearMonth, status: "confirmed", savedAt: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), records: records.map(r => ({ ...r, status: "confirmed" })), }, ], laborTasks: [ // 同月の自動生成タスクを除去してから追加 ...(c.laborTasks || []).filter(t => !(t.sourceModule === "payroll" && (t.title || "").includes(`${year}年${month}月分`))), ...newTasks, ], })); return newTasks; } // ─── 5. 全銀設定モーダル ─────────────────────────────────────── function ZenginSettingsModal({ client, onGenerate, onClose }) { const [settings, setSettings] = useState({ bankCode: (client.payrollSettings || {}).zenginBankCode || "", branchCode: (client.payrollSettings || {}).zenginBranchCode || "", accountNo: (client.payrollSettings || {}).zenginAccountNo || "", accountType: (client.payrollSettings || {}).zenginAccountType || "1", accountName: (client.payrollSettings || {}).zenginAccountName || "", }); function set(k, v) { setSettings(p => ({ ...p, [k]: v })); } return (
🏦 全銀フォーマット — 振込元口座設定
振込元（事業者）の口座情報を入力してください。生成されるテキストファイルをインターネットバンキングにアップロードすることで一括振込が行えます。
set("bankCode", e.target.value)} placeholder="0005" maxLength={4} style={PR.inp} />
set("branchCode", e.target.value)} placeholder="001" maxLength={3} style={PR.inp} />
set("accountNo", e.target.value)} placeholder="1234567" maxLength={7} style={PR.inp} />
set("accountName", e.target.value)} placeholder="ｶﾌﾞｼｷｶﾞｲｼｬ ｻﾝﾌﾟﾙ" maxLength={40} style={PR.inp} />
); } // ─── 6. TabPayrollV2 — Part 1 の TabPayroll を置き換える拡張版 ─ // 変更点: // - 勤怠詳細入力モーダル（AttendanceDetailModal）を追加 // - 明細印刷ボタン（printSlip）を追加 // - 全銀フォーマット出力（generateZengin）を追加 // - 給与確定時のタスク自動生成（confirmAndAutoTask）を組み込み // - 自動生成タスクのプレビュー表示 // ─── 勤怠取込パネル（コンポーネントとして定義） ────────────── function AttendanceImportPanel({ employees, getRecord, updateRecord, selectedMonth, onDone }) { const { useState } = React; const [importTab, setImportTab] = useState("guide"); const [csvPreview, setCsvPreview] = useState(null); const [csvError, setCsvError] = useState(""); const [mfRows, setMfRows] = useState(() => employees.map(emp => { const rec = getRecord(emp.id); return { empId: emp.id, empName: emp.name, empNo: emp.employeeNo || "", workDays: rec.workDays ?? 22, absenceDays: rec.absenceDays ?? 0, lateTime: rec.lateTime ?? 0, earlyLeaveTime: rec.earlyLeaveTime ?? 0, scheduledHours: rec.scheduledHrsMonth ?? 0, overtimeHours: rec.overtimeHours ?? 0, lateNightHours: rec.lateNightHours ?? 0, holidayWorkHrs: rec.holidayWorkHrs ?? 0, legalHolidayHrs: rec.legalHolidayHrs ?? 0, over60Hrs: rec.over60Hrs ?? 0, totalWorkHours: rec.totalWorkHours ?? 0, paidLeaveDays: rec.paidLeaveDays ?? 0, substituteLeave: rec.substituteLeave ?? 0, }; }) ); function updRow(empId, k, v) { setMfRows(prev => prev.map(r => r.empId === empId ? { ...r, [k]: Number(v) } : r)); } function applyToPayroll() { mfRows.forEach(row => { // 時間集計フィールドは分単位で入力→時間に変換 const toH = (min) => Math.round(min) / 60; updateRecord(row.empId, { workDays: row.workDays, absenceDays: row.absenceDays, lateTime: toH(row.lateTime), earlyLeaveTime: toH(row.earlyLeaveTime), scheduledHrsMonth: toH(row.scheduledHours), overtimeHours: toH(row.overtimeHours), lateNightHours: toH(row.lateNightHours), holidayWorkHrs: toH(row.holidayWorkHrs), legalHolidayHrs: toH(row.legalHolidayHrs), over60Hrs: toH(row.over60Hrs), totalWorkHours: toH(row.totalWorkHours), paidLeaveDays: row.paidLeaveDays, substituteLeave: row.substituteLeave, }); }); onDone(); } function handleMfCsv(e) { const file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return; setCsvError(""); setCsvPreview(null); const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = ev => { try { const lines = ev.target.result.split(/\r?\n/).filter(l => l.trim()); if (lines.length < 2) { setCsvError("CSVが空です"); return; } const header = lines[0].split(",").map(h => h.trim().replace(/^"|"$/g,"")); const H = (patterns) => header.findIndex(h => patterns.some(p => h.includes(p))); const colMap = { empName: H(["氏名","名前"]), empNo: H(["社員番号","従業員番号","スタッフコード"]), workDays: H(["出勤日数"]), absenceDays: H(["欠勤日数"]), lateTime: H(["遅刻時間"]), earlyLeaveTime: H(["早退時間"]), scheduledHours: H(["所定労働時間","所定時間"]), overtimeHours: H(["所定外労働時間","法定外残業","時間外"]), lateNightHours: H(["深夜労働時間","深夜時間"]), holidayWorkHrs: H(["所定休日労働時間","所定休日"]), legalHolidayHrs: H(["法定休日労働時間","法定休日"]), over60Hrs: H(["60時間超","時間外60"]), totalWorkHours: H(["総労働時間","実労働時間","総実働"]), paidLeaveDays: H(["有給休暇","有給取得","年次有給"]), substituteLeave: H(["代休"]), }; const preview = []; lines.slice(1).forEach(line => { const cols = line.split(",").map(c => c.trim().replace(/^"|"$/g,"")); const csvName = colMap.empName >= 0 ? cols[colMap.empName] : ""; const csvNo = colMap.empNo >= 0 ? cols[colMap.empNo] : ""; const emp = employees.find(e => (csvNo && (e.employeeNo === csvNo || e.id === csvNo)) || (csvName && e.name === csvName) ); const fields = {}; Object.entries(colMap).forEach(([k, ci]) => { if (ci >= 0 && cols[ci] !== undefined && cols[ci] !== "") { fields[k] = parseFloat(cols[ci].replace(/[^0-9.]/g,"")) || 0; } }); if (csvName || csvNo) preview.push({ empName: csvName || csvNo, matched: emp ? emp.name : null, empId: emp ? emp.id : null, fields }); }); setCsvPreview(preview); } catch(err) { setCsvError("CSVの解析に失敗: " + err.message); } }; reader.readAsText(file, "utf-8"); e.target.value = ""; } function applyCsvPreview() { if (!csvPreview) return; const MAP = { workDays:"workDays", absenceDays:"absenceDays", lateTime:"lateTime", earlyLeaveTime:"earlyLeaveTime", scheduledHours:"scheduledHrsMonth", overtimeHours:"overtimeHours", lateNightHours:"lateNightHours", holidayWorkHrs:"holidayWorkHrs", legalHolidayHrs:"legalHolidayHrs", over60Hrs:"over60Hrs", totalWorkHours:"totalWorkHours", paidLeaveDays:"paidLeaveDays", substituteLeave:"substituteLeave", }; csvPreview.filter(r => r.empId).forEach(row => { const patch = {}; Object.entries(row.fields).forEach(([k,v]) => { if (MAP[k]) patch[MAP[k]] = v; }); updateRecord(row.empId, patch); }); setMfRows(prev => prev.map(r => { const pr = csvPreview.find(p => p.empId === r.empId); if (!pr) return r; const updated = { ...r }; Object.entries(pr.fields).forEach(([k,v]) => { if (k in r) updated[k] = v; }); return updated; })); setCsvPreview(null); onDone(); } const INP_NUM = { background:"#FAFCFF", border:"1px solid #E2E8F0", borderRadius:6, padding:"4px 6px", color:"#1A1A2E", fontSize:11, fontFamily:"'DM Mono'", outline:"none", width:58, textAlign:"right", boxSizing:"border-box", colorScheme:"light" }; const GUIDE_ITEMS = [ { category:"日数集計", color:"#3B82F6", icon:"📅", items:[ { label:"出勤日数（平日）", mf:"出勤日数", req:true, unit:"日", note:"欠勤控除の計算基準" }, { label:"欠勤日数", mf:"欠勤日数", req:false, unit:"日", note:"欠勤控除の算出に使用" }, { label:"遅刻時間", mf:"遅刻時間", req:false, unit:"h", note:"時間単位での遅刻合計" }, { label:"早退時間", mf:"早退時間", req:false, unit:"h", note:"時間単位での早退合計" }, ]}, { category:"時間集計", color:"#16A34A", icon:"⏱️", items:[ { label:"所定労働時間（当月）", mf:"所定労働時間", req:true, unit:"h", note:"時給換算の基準" }, { label:"法定外残業（平日）", mf:"所定外労働時間", req:true, unit:"h", note:"割増賃金25%" }, { label:"深夜労働時間", mf:"深夜労働時間", req:false, unit:"h", note:"深夜割増25%（22〜5時）" }, { label:"所定休日労働時間", mf:"所定休日労働時間", req:false, unit:"h", note:"所定休日の時間外" }, { label:"法定休日労働時間", mf:"法定休日労働時間", req:false, unit:"h", note:"法定休日割増35%" }, { label:"60時間超残業", mf:"60時間超法定外", req:false, unit:"h", note:"追加割増25%（計50%）" }, { label:"総実働時間", mf:"総労働時間", req:false, unit:"h", note:"確認・記録用" }, ]}, { category:"休暇集計", color:"#D97706", icon:"🌴", items:[ { label:"有給取得日数", mf:"有給休暇", req:false, unit:"日", note:"残日数管理" }, { label:"代休取得日数", mf:"代休", req:false, unit:"日", note:"休日出勤の代休消化" }, ]}, ]; const ghostBtn = { background:"#F1F5F9", color:"#64748B", border:"1px solid #E5E7EB", borderRadius:6, padding:"7px 14px", fontSize:12, cursor:"pointer", fontFamily:"'Noto Sans JP'" }; const primaryBtn = { background:"#2563EB", color:"#1A1A2E", border:"none", borderRadius:6, padding:"7px 16px", fontSize:12, fontWeight:700, cursor:"pointer", fontFamily:"'Noto Sans JP'" }; return (
📥 勤怠データ取込
{selectedMonth.replace("-","年")}月分 · {employees.length}名
{/* タブ切替 */}
{[["guide","📖 取込ガイド"],["csv","🗂️ CSVインポート"],["manual","✏️ 手動入力"]].map(([id,label])=>( ))}
{/* ─ 取込ガイド ─ */} {importTab === "guide" && (
🔗 マネーフォワード クラウド勤怠との連携
マネフォ勤怠の 「日次勤怠 → 勤怠勤務表 → CSVエクスポート」 からデータを取得し、
「CSVインポート」タブでアップロードすると自動で取込めます。
手入力の場合は「手動入力」タブから月次勤怠を直接入力してください。
📌 マネフォ勤怠 CSVエクスポート手順
{["マネフォ クラウド勤怠にログイン","上部メニュー「日次勤怠」を選択","右上「勤怠勤務表 ∧」をクリックして一覧表示","対象月を選択","「CSVエクスポート」→「勤怠集計データ」を選択","ダウンロードしたCSVをこの画面の「CSVインポート」から取込む"].map((step, i) => (
{i+1}
{step}
))}
📋 取込項目一覧 — マネフォ列名との対応
{GUIDE_ITEMS.map(sec => (
{sec.icon}{sec.category}
{sec.items.map(item => (
{item.label} MF列名: {item.mf} {item.unit} {item.note} {item.req ? 必須 : 任意}
))}
))}
)} {/* ─ CSVインポート ─ */} {importTab === "csv" && (
{!csvPreview && (
🗂️
マネフォ勤怠CSVをアップロード
マネフォ クラウド勤怠からエクスポートしたCSVを選択してください。
社員番号または氏名で従業員を自動マッチングします。

{csvError}
)}
)} {csvPreview && (
取込プレビュー
{csvPreview.filter(r=>r.matched).length}名マッチ / {csvPreview.length}名

{row.matched ? "✅" : "❌"}
{row.empName}
{row.matched ?
→ {row.matched}
:
氏名・社員番号が一致しません
}
{row.matched && (
{[["出勤","workDays","日"],["欠勤","absenceDays","日"],["残業","overtimeHours","h"],["深夜","lateNightHours","h"],["法定休","legalHolidayHrs","h"],["総実働","totalWorkHours","h"]].filter(([,k])=>row.fields[k]!==undefined&&row.fields[k]>0).map(([l,k,u])=>( {l}: {row.fields[k]}{u} ))}
)}
))}
)}
)} {/* ─ 手動入力 ─ */} {importTab === "manual" && (
💡 時間集計は分単位で入力してください（例: 1時間30分 → 90分）。日数は0.5刻みで入力可能です。
{[["出勤","日","#3B82F6"],["欠勤","日","#3B82F6"],["遅刻","分","#3B82F6"],["早退","分","#3B82F6"],["所定","分","#16A34A"],["法定外残業","分","#16A34A"],["深夜","分","#16A34A"],["所定休日","分","#16A34A"],["法定休日","分","#16A34A"],["60h超","分","#16A34A"],["総実働","分","#16A34A"],["有給","日","#D97706"],["代休","日","#D97706"]].map(([l,u,c],i)=>( ))} {mfRows.map((row, ri) => { const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === row.empId); return ( {/* 日数（0.5刻み） */} {[["workDays",0.5],["absenceDays",0.5],["lateTime",1],["earlyLeaveTime",1]].map(([k,step],ci)=>( ))} {/* 時間（分単位、step=1） */} {[["scheduledHours",1],["overtimeHours",1],["lateNightHours",1],["holidayWorkHrs",1],["legalHolidayHrs",1],["over60Hrs",1],["totalWorkHours",1]].map(([k,step],ci)=>( ))} {/* 休暇（0.5刻み） */} {[["paidLeaveDays",0.5],["substituteLeave",0.5]].map(([k,step],ci)=>( ))} ); })}
氏名 📅 日数集計 ⏱️ 時間集計（分単位） 🌴 休暇
{l}
{u}
{row.empName}
{row.empNo?"#"+row.empNo:""} {emp ? emp.dept||"" : ""}
 e.target.select()} onChange={e=>updRow(row.empId,k,e.target.value)} style={INP_NUM}/> e.target.select()} onChange={e=>updRow(row.empId,k,e.target.value)} style={INP_NUM}/> e.target.select()} onChange={e=>updRow(row.empId,k,e.target.value)} style={INP_NUM}/>
)}
); } function TabPayrollV2({ client: rawClient, updateClient, auth }) { const client = migratePlans(rawClient); const [view, setView] = useState("list"); const [selectedMonth, setSelectedMonth] = useState(() => { const d = new Date(); return `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0")}`; }); const [selectedEmpId, setSelectedEmpId] = useState(null); const [attendanceModal, setAttendanceModal] = useState(null); // employee object | null const [zenginModal, setZenginModal] = useState(false); const [confirmToast, setConfirmToast] = useState(null); // {message, tasks} const [slipEmpId, setSlipEmpId] = useState(null); // 帳票一覧 const [reportView, setReportView] = useState("index"); // "index" | "slip_list" | "transfer_list" const [reportYear, setReportYear] = useState(() => new Date().getFullYear().toString()); const [reportEmpId, setReportEmpId] = useState(null); const [reportEmpSearch, setReportEmpSearch] = useState(""); // 支払業務 const [paySubTab, setPaySubTab] = useState("salary"); const [transferMethod, setTransferMethod] = useState("salary"); const [recordLength, setRecordLength] = useState("120"); const [addSeparator, setAddSeparator] = useState(false); const [addEOF, setAddEOF] = useState(false); const [csvFormat, setCsvFormat] = useState("sjis"); const [targetSalary, setTargetSalary] = useState(true); const [targetBonus, setTargetBonus] = useState(false); const [paymentDate, setPaymentDate] = useState(() => { const d = new Date(); const ps2 = {}; return `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0")}-25`; }); const [residentMonth, setResidentMonth] = useState(() => { const d = new Date(); return `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0")}`; }); const [residentPayDate, setResidentPayDate] = useState(() => { const d = new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth()+1, 10); return d.toISOString().slice(0,10); }); const [residentYear, setResidentYear] = useState(new Date().getFullYear()); const [residentMonthNum,setResidentMonthNum]= useState(new Date().getMonth()+1); // 帳票専用 state const [commuteCsvFmt, setCommuteCsvFmt] = useState("sjis"); const [commuteOnlyWith, setCommuteOnlyWith] = useState(true); const [workerShowRetired, setWorkerShowRetired] = useState(false); const employees = (client.employeeList || []).filter(e => e.status === "active"); const payrollMonths = client.payrollMonths || []; function makeDefaultRecords(emps) { return emps.map(emp => ({ employeeId: emp.id, workDays: 22, workHoursPerDay: 8, overtimeHours: 0, lateNightHours: 0, holidayHours: 0, absenceDays: 0, otherDeductions: [], status: "draft", })); } const [records, setRecords] = useState(() => { const m = payrollMonths.find(m => m.yearMonth === selectedMonth); return m ? m.records : makeDefaultRecords(employees); }); useEffect(() => { const m = payrollMonths.find(m => m.yearMonth === selectedMonth); setRecords(m ? m.records : makeDefaultRecords(employees)); }, [selectedMonth]); function getEmp(id) { return (client.employeeList || []).find(e => e.id === id); } function getRecord(id) { return records.find(r => r.employeeId === id) || {}; } function updateRecord(empId, patch) { setRecords(prev => prev.map(r => r.employeeId === empId ? { ...r, ...patch } : r)); } // 一時保存 function saveAsDraft() { updateClient(c => ({ ...c, payrollMonths: [ ...(c.payrollMonths || []).filter(m => m.yearMonth !== selectedMonth), { id: `pm_${Date.now()}`, yearMonth: selectedMonth, status: "draft", savedAt: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), records }, ], })); } // 確定 + タスク自動生成 function handleConfirm() { const staffId = auth && auth.staffId ? auth.staffId : "s1"; const newTasks = confirmAndAutoTask(client, updateClient, selectedMonth, records, staffId); setRecords(prev => prev.map(r => ({ ...r, status: "confirmed" }))); setConfirmToast({ message: `${selectedMonth.replace("-", "年")}月分を確定しました`, tasks: newTasks, }); setTimeout(() => setConfirmToast(null), 8000); } // 振込済みにする function markAsPaid() { updateClient(c => ({ ...c, payrollMonths: [ ...(c.payrollMonths || []).filter(m => m.yearMonth !== selectedMonth), { id: `pm_${Date.now()}`, yearMonth: selectedMonth, status: "paid", savedAt: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), records: records.map(r => ({ ...r, status: "paid" })) }, ], })); setRecords(prev => prev.map(r => ({ ...r, status: "paid" }))); } const summary = employees.map(emp => { const rec = getRecord(emp.id); const result = calcPayroll(emp, rec, Number(emp.residentTax || 0)); return { emp, rec, result }; }); const totalGross = summary.reduce((s, r) => s + r.result.grossPay, 0); const totalDeduct = summary.reduce((s, r) => s + r.result.totalDeductions, 0); const totalNet = summary.reduce((s, r) => s + r.result.netPay, 0); const PAY_STATUS = { draft: { l: "作成中", c: "#94A3B8", bg: "rgba(142,142,147,0.12)" }, confirmed: { l: "確定済", c: "#3B82F6", bg: "#DBEAFE" }, paid: { l: "振込済", c: "#16A34A", bg: "#DCFCE7" }, }; const currentMonth = payrollMonths.find(m => m.yearMonth === selectedMonth); const monthStatus = currentMonth ? (PAY_STATUS[currentMonth.status] || PAY_STATUS.draft) : PAY_STATUS.draft; const isConfirmed = currentMonth && currentMonth.status !== "draft"; const SUB_TABS = [ { id: "list", label: "月次給与一覧", badge: null }, { id: "attendance_import", label: "📥 勤怠取込", badge: null }, { id: "employees", label: "従業員台帳", badge: employees.length }, { id: "payment", label: "支払業務", badge: null }, { id: "reports", label: "帳票一覧", badge: null }, ]; return (
{/* 確定トースト */} {confirmToast && (
✅
{confirmToast.message}
以下のタスクが自動生成されました（対応タスクタブで確認できます）:
{confirmToast.tasks.map(t => (
✅ {t.title}（期限: {t.dueDate}）
))}
)} {/* サブタブ */} {view !== "slip" && (
{SUB_TABS.map(t => ( ))}
)} {/* ══ 月次給与一覧 ══ */} {view === "list" && (
{/* ヘッダー */}
💴 給与計算
対象: {employees.length}名 {monthStatus.l}
setSelectedMonth(e.target.value)} style={{ ...PR.inp, width: 138 }} /> {!isConfirmed && ( <> {/* CSVインポート */} )} {isConfirmed && currentMonth.status === "confirmed" && ( )} {summary.length > 0 && ( )}
{/* クライアント送信済みバナー */} {(() => { const m = payrollMonths.find(pm => pm.yearMonth === selectedMonth); if (!m || m.status !== "client_submitted") return null; return (
📨
クライアントから勤怠データが届きました
送信者: {m.submittedBy} / {m.submittedAt} — 下記の内容を確認して給与計算を進めてください
); })()} {/* 月サマリ */}
{[ { l: "支給合計", v: totalGross, c: "#16A34A" }, { l: "控除合計", v: totalDeduct, c: "#D97706" }, { l: "差引振込合計", v: totalNet, c: "#D97706" }, ].map(item => (
{item.l}
¥{fmt(item.v)}
))}
{/* 確定済み警告バナー */} {isConfirmed && (
💡 この月は確定済みです。修正する場合は「一時保存」で差し戻してください。
)} {/* 従業員別一覧 */} {employees.length === 0 ? (
💴
在籍中の従業員がいません
「従業員台帳」タブから登録してください
) : (
{/* テーブルヘッダ */}
氏名 勤怠 支給 控除 差引支給 状態
{summary.map(({ emp, rec, result }) => { const st = PAY_STATUS[rec.status] || PAY_STATUS.draft; const hasDetail = rec.overtimeHours > 0 || rec.lateNightHours > 0 || rec.holidayHours > 0 || rec.absenceDays > 0 || (rec.otherDeductions || []).length > 0; return (
{/* 氏名 */}
{emp.name}
{emp.dept}
{/* 勤怠（簡易 + 詳細ボタン） */}
{rec.workDays ?? 22}日 {rec.overtimeHours > 0 && / 残{rec.overtimeHours}h} {rec.lateNightHours > 0 && 深夜{rec.lateNightHours}h} {rec.absenceDays > 0 && 欠{rec.absenceDays}日}
{!isConfirmed && ( )}
{/* 金額 */}
¥{fmt(result.grossPay)}
¥{fmt(result.totalDeductions)}
¥{fmt(result.netPay)}
{/* ステータス */}
{st.l}
{/* 操作ボタン */}
{/* 社保情報（確定済みは折りたたみ表示） */} {rec.status === "confirmed" && (
健保 ¥{fmt(result.healthIns)} 年金 ¥{fmt(result.pension)} 雇保 ¥{fmt(result.empIns)} 所得税 ¥{fmt(result.incomeTax)} 住民税 ¥{fmt(result.residentTax)}
)}
); })}
)} {/* 過去の処理月 */} {payrollMonths.filter(m => m.yearMonth !== selectedMonth).length > 0 && (
過去の処理月
{payrollMonths.filter(m => m.yearMonth !== selectedMonth) .sort((a, b) => b.yearMonth > a.yearMonth ? 1 : -1) .map(m => { const st = PAY_STATUS[m.status] || PAY_STATUS.draft; return ( ); })}
)}
)} {/* ══ 勤怠取込パネル ══ */} {view === "attendance_import" && ( setView("list")} /> )} {/* ══ 従業員台帳 ══ */} {view === "employees" && ( )} {/* ══ 給与明細 ══ */} {view === "slip" && (() => { const empId = slipEmpId || selectedEmpId; const emp = getEmp(empId); const rec = getRecord(empId); const result = emp ? calcPayroll(emp, rec, Number(emp.residentTax || 0)) : null; if (!emp || !result) return (
); const sal = emp.salary || {}; return (
ブラウザの印刷ダイアログから「PDFに保存」を選択できます
{/* 明細ヘッダー */}
給与明細書
{selectedMonth.replace("-", "年")}月分 · {emp.name} 様
{[emp.dept, emp.position, emp.empType].filter(Boolean).join(" · ")}
{client.name}
¥{fmt(result.netPay)}
差引支給額
{/* 支給 / 控除 2カラム */}
支給
{[ ["基本給", result.baseSalary, true], ["交通費", result.transport, Number(sal.transportAllowance) > 0], ["役職手当", result.positionAlw, Number(sal.positionAllowance) > 0], ["その他手当", result.otherAlw, result.otherAlw > 0], ["時間外手当", result.otPay, result.otPay > 0], ["欠勤控除（−）", -result.absDeduct, result.absDeduct > 0], ].filter(([,,s]) => s).map(([l, v]) => (
{l} {v < 0 ? `−¥${fmt(-v)}` : `¥${fmt(v)}`}
))}
支給合計 ¥{fmt(result.grossPay)}
控除
{[ ["健康保険", result.healthIns], ["厚生年金", result.pension], ["雇用保険", result.empIns], ["所得税", result.incomeTax], ["住民税", result.residentTax], ...(rec.otherDeductions || []).filter(d => Number(d.amount) > 0).map(d => [d.label, Number(d.amount)]), ].map(([l, v]) => (
{l} ¥{fmt(v)}
))}
控除合計 ¥{fmt(result.totalDeductions)}
{/* 差引支給額 */}
差引支給額（振込額）
{emp.bank && emp.bank.bankName && (
{emp.bank.bankName} {emp.bank.branchName} {emp.bank.accountType} {emp.bank.accountNo}
)}
¥{fmt(result.netPay)}
{/* 社保等級・勤怠サマリ */}
{[ ["出勤日数", `${rec.workDays ?? 22}日`], ["時間外", `${result.ot}h${result.ln > 0 ? ` / 深夜${result.ln}h` : ""}${result.hol > 0 ? ` / 休日${result.hol}h` : ""}`], ["標準報酬月額", `¥${fmt(result.standard)}（${result.grade}等級）`], ["課税対象額", `¥${fmt(result.taxable)}`], ["扶養親族", `${(emp.insurance || {}).dependents || 0}人`], ["源泉徴収区分", (emp.tax || {}).withholdingType === "B" ? "乙欄" : "甲欄"], ].map(([l, v]) => (
{l}
{v}
))}
); })()} {/* ══ 帳票一覧 ══ */} {view === "reports" && (() => { const REPORT_GROUPS = [ { title: "毎月確認するもの", items: [ { name:"給与明細", id:"slip", action: () => { setReportView("slip_list"); } }, { name:"給与振込一覧表", id:"transfer_list", action: () => { setReportView("transfer_list"); } }, { name:"支給控除一覧表", id:"deduct_list", action: () => { setReportView("deduct_list"); } }, { name:"支給控除一覧表（部門別）", id:"deduct_dept", action: () => { setReportView("deduct_dept"); } }, ]}, { title: "税務署へ届出が必要な書類", items: [ { name:"所得税徴収高計算書", id:"income_tax_sheet", action: () => { setReportView("income_tax"); } }, { name:"所得税徴収高計算書（納特）", id:"income_tax_special", action: () => { setReportView("income_tax_special"); } }, ]}, { title: "住民税額の確認に使うもの", items: [ { name:"住民税徴収額一覧表", id:"resident_list", action: () => { setReportView("resident_list"); } }, { name:"住民税徴収額一覧表（月単位）", id:"resident_monthly", action: () => { setReportView("resident_monthly"); } }, ]}, { title: "賞与を支給した際に確認するもの", items: [ { name:"賞与明細", id:"bonus_slip", action: () => { setReportView("bonus_slip"); } }, { name:"賞与振込一覧表", id:"bonus_transfer", action: () => { setReportView("bonus_transfer"); } }, { name:"支給控除一覧表（賞与）", id:"deduct_bonus", action: () => { setReportView("deduct_bonus"); } }, { name:"支給控除一覧表（賞与部門別）", id:"deduct_bonus_dept", action: () => { setReportView("deduct_bonus_dept"); } }, ]}, { title: "年金事務所へ届出が必要な書類", items: [ { name:"賞与支払届", id:"bonus_report", action: () => { setReportView("bonus_report"); } }, { name:"賞与支払届総括表", id:"bonus_summary", action: () => {} }, ]}, { title: "退職者へ発行するもの", items: [ { name:"退職者の源泉徴収票", id:"retire_withholding", action: () => { setReportView("retire_withholding"); } }, ]}, { title: "帳簿作成・保管義務のある書類", items: [ { name:"賃金台帳", id:"wage_ledger", action: () => { setReportView("wage_ledger"); } }, { name:"労働者名簿", id:"worker_list", action: () => { setReportView("worker_list"); } }, ]}, { title: "年末調整関係書類", items: [ { name:"扶養控除等申告書", id:"dep_exemption" }, { name:"保険料控除申告書", id:"ins_deduction" }, { name:"配偶者控除等申告書", id:"spouse_deduction" }, { name:"保険料控除 兼 配偶者特別控除申告書", id:"ins_spouse" }, { name:"源泉徴収簿", id:"withholding_book" }, { name:"基礎控除 兼 配偶者控除等 兼 所得金額調整控除申告書", id:"basic_adj" }, { name:"源泉徴収票", id:"withholding_slip" }, ]}, { title: "市町村へ届出が必要な書類", items: [ { name:"給与支払報告書", id:"salary_report", action: () => {} }, { name:"退職者の給与支払報告書", id:"retire_report", action: () => {} }, { name:"給与支払報告書 総括表", id:"salary_summary", action: () => {} }, ]}, { title: "税務署へ届出が必要な書類", items: [ { name:"法定調書合計表（給与所得等）", id:"legal_summary", action: () => {} }, ]}, { title: "社会保険関係書類", items: [ { name:"算定基礎届", id:"grade_calc", action: () => {} }, { name:"月額変更届", id:"monthly_change", action: () => {} }, { name:"年度更新（算定基礎賃金集計表/年度更新申告書）", id:"year_update", action: () => {} }, ]}, ]; // 給与明細一覧ビュー if (reportView === "slip_list") { const filteredEmps = employees.filter(e => { if (!reportEmpSearch) return true; return e.name.includes(reportEmpSearch) || (e.nameKana||"").includes(reportEmpSearch) || (e.employeeNo||"").includes(reportEmpSearch); }); const activeReportEmpId = reportEmpId || (filteredEmps[0]?.id); const activeEmp = employees.find(e => e.id === activeReportEmpId); const confirmedMonth = payrollMonths.find(pm => pm.yearMonth === selectedMonth); const rec = confirmedMonth?.records?.find(r => r.employeeId === activeReportEmpId) || { workDays:22, workHoursPerDay:8, overtimeHours:0, lateNightHours:0, holidayHours:0, absenceDays:0 }; const result = activeEmp ? calcPayroll(activeEmp, rec, Number(activeEmp.residentTax||0)) : null; return (

setReportEmpId(emp.id)} style={{ padding:"8px 12px", cursor:"pointer", borderBottom:"1px solid #F8F9FA", background: emp.id===activeReportEmpId ? "#EFF6FF" : "#FFFFFF", borderLeft: emp.id===activeReportEmpId ? "3px solid #2563EB" : "3px solid transparent" }}>

))}

))}

{[ { title:"勤怠", bg:"#2563EB", items:[ ["出勤日数（平日）", `${rec.workDays||22}日`], ["総実働時間", `${(rec.totalWorkHours||rec.workDays*8).toFixed(0)}:00`], ["有休残日数", `${rec.paidLeaveDays||0}日`], ]}, { title:"支給", bg:"#2563EB", items:[ ...(activeEmp.empType==="役員" ? [["役員報酬", fmt(result.baseSalary)]] : [["基本給", fmt(result.baseSalary)]]), result.transport>0?["通勤手当/非課税", fmt(result.transport)]:null, result.otPay>0?["残業手当", fmt(result.otPay)]:null, result.positionAlw>0?["役職手当", fmt(result.positionAlw)]:null, ].filter(Boolean)}, { title:"控除", bg:"#2563EB", items:[ ["健康保険料", fmt(result.healthIns)], ["厚生年金保険料", fmt(result.pension)], result.empIns>0?["雇用保険料", fmt(result.empIns)]:null, ["所得税", fmt(result.incomeTax)], result.residentTax>0?["住民税", fmt(result.residentTax)]:null, (rec.otherDeductions||[]).reduce((s,d)=>s+Number(d.amount),0)>0?["その他控除", fmt((rec.otherDeductions||[]).reduce((s,d)=>s+Number(d.amount),0))]:null, ].filter(Boolean)}, { title:"その他", bg:"#2563EB", items:[] }, ].map(col => (
{col.title}

))}

); } // 給与振込一覧表 if (reportView === "transfer_list") { const confirmedMonth = payrollMonths.find(pm => pm.yearMonth === selectedMonth); const records = confirmedMonth?.records || []; // 全従業員の振込データを生成 const transferRows = employees.map(emp => { const rec = records.find(r => r.employeeId === emp.id) || { workDays:22, workHoursPerDay:8, overtimeHours:0, lateNightHours:0, holidayHours:0, absenceDays:0 }; const result = calcPayroll(emp, rec, Number(emp.residentTax||0)); const bank = emp.bank || {}; return { emp, bankName: bank.bankName || emp.bankName || "—", branchName: bank.branchName || emp.bankBranch || "—", accountNo: bank.accountNo || emp.bankAccount || "—", accountType: bank.accountType || emp.bankType || "普通", nameKana: emp.nameKana || "", netPay: result.netPay, }; }).filter(r => r.netPay > 0); const totalAmount = transferRows.reduce((s,r) => s+r.netPay, 0); const ps = client.payrollSettings || {}; const payDay = ps.payDay || 25; const payDateLabel = `令和${String(Number(selectedMonth.split("-")[0])-2018).padStart(2,"0")}年${selectedMonth.split("-")[1]}月${String(payDay).padStart(2,"0")}日`; const closingLabel = ps.closingDay===31||!ps.closingDay?"末締翌月末払":"締め日グループ1"; return (

); } // ── 支給控除一覧表 ── if (reportView === "deduct_list" || reportView === "deduct_dept") { const isDept = reportView === "deduct_dept"; const confirmedMonth = payrollMonths.find(pm => pm.yearMonth === selectedMonth); const records = confirmedMonth?.records || []; const rows = employees.map(emp => { const rec = records.find(r => r.employeeId === emp.id) || { workDays:22, workHoursPerDay:8, overtimeHours:0, lateNightHours:0, holidayHours:0, absenceDays:0 }; const r = calcPayroll(emp, rec, Number(emp.residentTax||0)); return { emp, rec, r }; }); const ps = client.payrollSettings || {}; const payDay = ps.payDay || 25; const payDateLabel = `${selectedMonth.replace("-","年")}月${payDay}日支給`; // 部門別グループ化 const grouped = isDept ? rows.reduce((acc, row) => { const dept = row.emp.dept || "未設定"; if (!acc[dept]) acc[dept] = []; acc[dept].push(row); return acc; }, {}) : null; const TableHeader = () => ( {["従業員番号","従業員","所属事業所","部門","職種","契約種別","出勤日数","基本給","手当合計","支給合計","健保","厚年","雇保","所得税","住民税","控除合計","差引支給額"].map(h => ( {h} ))} ); const EmpRow = ({ row, i }) => ( {row.emp.employeeNo||"—"} {row.emp.name} {client.name} {row.emp.dept||"—"} {row.emp.jobType||"—"} {row.emp.empType} {row.rec.workDays||22} {fmt(row.r.baseSalary)} {fmt(row.r.transport+row.r.positionAlw+row.r.otherAlw+row.r.otPay)} {fmt(row.r.grossPay)} {fmt(row.r.healthIns)} {fmt(row.r.pension)} {fmt(row.r.empIns)} {fmt(row.r.incomeTax)} {fmt(row.r.residentTax)} {fmt(row.r.totalDeductions)} {fmt(row.r.netPay)} ); const totalRow = rows.reduce((acc, {r}) => ({ gross: acc.gross+r.grossPay, health: acc.health+r.healthIns, pension: acc.pension+r.pension, emp: acc.emp+r.empIns, income: acc.income+r.incomeTax, resident: acc.resident+r.residentTax, deduct: acc.deduct+r.totalDeductions, net: acc.net+r.netPay, }), { gross:0, health:0, pension:0, emp:0, income:0, resident:0, deduct:0, net:0 }); return (

); } // ── 所得税徴収高計算書 ── if (reportView === "income_tax" || reportView === "income_tax_special") { const isSpecial = reportView === "income_tax_special"; const confirmedMonth = payrollMonths.find(pm => pm.yearMonth === selectedMonth); const records = confirmedMonth?.records || []; const totalIncomeTax = employees.reduce((s, emp) => { const rec = records.find(r => r.employeeId === emp.id) || { workDays:22, workHoursPerDay:8, overtimeHours:0, lateNightHours:0, holidayHours:0, absenceDays:0 }; return s + calcPayroll(emp, rec, Number(emp.residentTax||0)).incomeTax; }, 0); const [yr, mo] = selectedMonth.split("-"); const reiwaYear = Number(yr) - 2018; const officeCode = (client.payrollSettings||{}).taxOfficeCode || "32309"; const officeBranch = (client.payrollSettings||{}).taxOfficeBranch || "07"; return (

); } // ── 住民税徴収額一覧表 ── if (reportView === "resident_list" || reportView === "resident_monthly") { const isMonthly = reportView === "resident_monthly"; const ps = client.payrollSettings || {}; const payDay = ps.payDay || 25; const payDateLabel = `令和${Number(selectedMonth.split("-")[0])-2018}年${selectedMonth.split("-")[1]}月${payDay}日`; const dueDateLabel = `令和${Number(selectedMonth.split("-")[0])-2018}年${String(Number(selectedMonth.split("-")[1])+1).padStart(2,"0")}月10日`; // 従業員を住所都道府県でグループ化 const grouped = employees.reduce((acc, emp) => { const addr = emp.juuminAddress || emp.address || ""; const pref = addr.match(/^(.*?[都道府県])/) ? addr.match(/^(.*?[都道府県])/)[1] : "東京都"; const city = addr.replace(pref, "").match(/^([^\s]+[市区町村])/)?.[1] || addr.replace(pref,"").split(/[0-9]/)[0] || "—"; const key = pref + city; if (!acc[key]) acc[key] = { location:pref+city, emps:[] }; acc[key].emps.push(emp); return acc; }, {}); return (

Math.round((activeEmp.salary?.baseSalary||0) * 0.4) : 0; const bonusRec = { workDays:0, workHoursPerDay:8, overtimeHours:0, lateNightHours:0, holidayHours:0, absenceDays:0, bonusAmount }; const bonusResult = activeEmp ? calcPayroll({...activeEmp, salary:{...activeEmp.salary, baseSalary:bonusAmount}}, bonusRec, 0) : null; return (

); } // ── 賞与支払届 ── if (reportView === "bonus_report") { const bonusRows = employees.map(emp => { const bonusAmt = Math.round((emp.salary?.baseSalary||0) * 0.4); return { emp, bonusAmt }; }); return (

{row.emp.pensionNo||row.emp.healthInsuranceNo||String(i+1)} {row.emp.name} {row.emp.birthDate ? `7-${row.emp.birthDate.replace(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})$/,(_,y,m,d)=>`${String(Number(m)).padStart(2,"0")}${d}`)}` : "—"} {fmt(row.bonusAmt)}円 0 円 {fmt(Math.floor(row.bonusAmt/1000)*1000)} 000円
); } // ── 通勤手当一覧（交通用具） ── if (reportView === "commute_list") { // use top-level commuteCsvFmt, commuteOnlyWith const commuteEmps = employees.filter(e => !commuteOnlyWith || (e.salary?.transportAllowance||0) > 0); return (
通勤手当一覧（交通用具）
令和7年4月以降の新限度額表に基づいた通勤手当（交通用具）の課税・非課税額を基に令和7年の年末調整計算を行う必要があります。
{/* 1. 締め日グループ */}
1. 締め日グループを選択
締め日グループ

{[["sjis","Excel用（Shift-JIS）"],["utf8","その他（UTF-8）"]].map(([id,label])=>(
); } // ── 各人別控除事積簿（定額減税） ── if (reportView === "basic_adj") { const deductRows = employees.map(emp => { const deps = (emp.insurance?.dependents||0) + (emp.hasSpouse==="有"?1:0); const monthlyDeduct = deps>=3?120000:deps===2?90000:deps===1?60000:30000; const confirmedMonth = payrollMonths.find(pm => pm.yearMonth === selectedMonth); const rec = confirmedMonth?.records?.find(r=>r.employeeId===emp.id) || {workDays:22,workHoursPerDay:8,overtimeHours:0,lateNightHours:0,holidayHours:0,absenceDays:0}; const r = calcPayroll(emp, rec, Number(emp.residentTax||0)); const deducted = Math.min(r.incomeTax, monthlyDeduct); return { emp, deps, monthlyDeduct, incomeTax:r.incomeTax, deducted, remaining:Math.max(0,monthlyDeduct-deducted) }; }); return (
令和6年分　定額減税（所得税）
各人別控除事積簿
令和6年分 定額減税の月次減税額や控除項目「定額減税（所得税）」を管理します。
確定した給与・賞与について、従業員ごとの月次減税額や控除した金額などを一覧で確認できます。
{["控除前税額","控除した金額","控除しきれない金額"].map(h=>( ))} {deductRows.map((row,i)=>( ))}

); } // ── 退職者の源泉徴収票 ── if (reportView === "retire_withholding") { const retiredEmps = employees.filter(e => e.status === "retired" || e.retireDate || e.leaveDate); const activeRetireId = reportEmpId || retiredEmps[0]?.id; const activeEmp = employees.find(e => e.id === activeRetireId); const confirmedMonths = payrollMonths.filter(pm => pm.yearMonth.startsWith(reportYear)); const yearTotal = (() => { if (!activeEmp) return { gross:0, tax:0, socialIns:0 }; let gross=0, tax=0, socialIns=0; confirmedMonths.forEach(pm => { const rec = pm.records?.find(r=>r.employeeId===activeEmp.id); if (!rec) return; const r = calcPayroll(activeEmp, rec, Number(activeEmp.residentTax||0)); gross += r.grossPay; tax += r.incomeTax; socialIns += r.healthIns+r.pension+r.empIns; }); return { gross, tax, socialIns }; })(); return (

{(retiredEmps.filter(e=>!reportEmpSearch||e.name.includes(reportEmpSearch)||(e.employeeNo||"").includes(reportEmpSearch))).map(emp=>(
setReportEmpId(emp.id)} style={{padding:"7px 12px",cursor:"pointer",borderBottom:"1px solid #F8F9FA", background:emp.id===activeRetireId?"#EFF6FF":"#FFFFFF", borderLeft:emp.id===activeRetireId?"3px solid #2563EB":"3px solid transparent"}}>

); } // ── 賃金台帳 ── if (reportView === "wage_ledger") { const activeWageId = reportEmpId || employees[0]?.id; const activeEmp = employees.find(e => e.id === activeWageId); const filteredEmps2 = employees.filter(e => !reportEmpSearch || e.name.includes(reportEmpSearch) || (e.employeeNo||"").includes(reportEmpSearch)); // 月別データ生成 const months = payrollMonths.filter(pm => pm.yearMonth.startsWith(reportYear)).map(pm => { const rec = pm.records?.find(r=>r.employeeId===activeWageId) || {workDays:22,workHoursPerDay:8,overtimeHours:0,lateNightHours:0,holidayHours:0,absenceDays:0}; const r = activeEmp ? calcPayroll(activeEmp, rec, Number(activeEmp.residentTax||0)) : null; return { ym: pm.yearMonth, rec, r }; }); const total = months.reduce((acc, {r}) => r ? { workDays: acc.workDays+(r.ot||0)*0, grossPay: acc.grossPay+r.grossPay, healthIns: acc.healthIns+r.healthIns, pension: acc.pension+r.pension, empIns: acc.empIns+r.empIns, incomeTax: acc.incomeTax+r.incomeTax, residentTax: acc.residentTax+r.residentTax, netPay: acc.netPay+r.netPay, } : acc, {workDays:0,grossPay:0,healthIns:0,pension:0,empIns:0,incomeTax:0,residentTax:0,netPay:0}); const ROWS = [ ["出勤日数（平日）", m => `${m.rec.workDays||22}`], ["欠勤日数（平日）", m => `${m.rec.absenceDays||0}`], ["遅刻時間（平日）", m => `${m.rec.lateTime||0}`], ["早退時間（平日）", m => `${m.rec.earlyLeaveTime||0}`], ["総実働時間", m => `${m.rec.totalWorkHours||((m.rec.workDays||22)*(m.rec.workHoursPerDay||8))}:00`], ["有休残日数", m => `${m.rec.paidLeaveDays||0}`], ["役員報酬（支給）", m => m.r&&activeEmp?.empType==="役員" ? fmt(m.r.baseSalary) : ""], ["基本給（支給）", m => m.r&&activeEmp?.empType!=="役員" ? fmt(m.r.baseSalary) : ""], ["役職手当（支給）", m => m.r&&m.r.positionAlw>0 ? fmt(m.r.positionAlw) : ""], ["通勤手当/非課税（支給）", m => m.r&&m.r.transport>0 ? fmt(m.r.transport) : ""], ["残業手当（支給）", m => m.r&&m.r.otPay>0 ? fmt(m.r.otPay) : ""], ["支給合計", m => m.r ? fmt(m.r.grossPay) : ""], ["健康保険料（控除）", m => m.r ? fmt(m.r.healthIns) : ""], ["厚生年金保険料（控除）", m => m.r ? fmt(m.r.pension) : ""], ["雇用保険料（控除）", m => m.r ? fmt(m.r.empIns) : ""], ["所得税（控除）", m => m.r ? fmt(m.r.incomeTax) : ""], ["住民税（控除）", m => m.r ? fmt(m.r.residentTax) : ""], ["控除合計", m => m.r ? fmt(m.r.totalDeductions) : ""], ["差引支給額", m => m.r ? fmt(m.r.netPay) : ""], ]; return (

); } // ── 労働者名簿 ── if (reportView === "worker_list") { // use top-level workerShowRetired const listEmps = (workerShowRetired ? employees : employees.filter(e=>e.status!=="retired")).filter(e=>!reportEmpSearch||e.name.includes(reportEmpSearch)||(e.employeeNo||"").includes(reportEmpSearch)); return (

); })()} {/* ══ 支払業務 ══ */} {view === "payment" && (() => { // 振込合計を計算 const confirmedMonth = payrollMonths.find(pm => pm.yearMonth === selectedMonth); const records = confirmedMonth?.records || []; const totalAmount = records.reduce((s, r) => { const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === r.employeeId); if (!emp) return s; return s + Math.max(0, calcPayroll(emp, r, Number(emp.residentTax||0)).netPay); }, 0); const totalResidentTax = employees.reduce((s, e) => s + Number(e.residentTax||0), 0); const ps = client.payrollSettings || {}; const INP2 = { background:"#FAFCFF", border:"1px solid #E2E8F0", borderRadius:6, padding:"6px 10px", color:"#1A1A2E", fontSize:12, fontFamily:"'Noto Sans JP'", outline:"none", colorScheme:"light" }; const SectionLabel = ({ n, label }) => (

); const Row = ({ label, children }) => (

); return (

{[[addSeparator,setAddSeparator,"最後の2バイトに区切り文字を付与する"], [addEOF,setAddEOF,"データの最後にEOFを付与する"]].map(([checked,fn,label]) => ( ))}

); })()} {/* 勤怠詳細入力モーダル */} {attendanceModal && ( { updateRecord(attendanceModal.id, form); setAttendanceModal(null); }} onClose={() => setAttendanceModal(null)} /> )} {/* 全銀設定モーダル */} {zenginModal && ( { const result = generateZengin(summary, { ...settings, accountName: settings.accountName || client.name, }, selectedMonth); setZenginModal(false); alert(`全銀ファイルを生成しました。\n振込件数: ${result.totalCount}件 / 合計: ¥${fmt(result.totalAmount)}`); }} onClose={() => setZenginModal(false)} /> )}
); } // ============================================================= // ■ 統合時のエクスポート（Part 1 と合わせて使う） // // export { // // Part 2 追加分 // TabPayrollV2, // Part 1 の TabPayroll を置き換える // AttendanceDetailModal, // 勤怠詳細入力（単独でも使用可） // ZenginSettingsModal, // 全銀設定（単独でも使用可） // printSlip, // 明細印刷（単独でも使用可） // generateZengin, // 全銀フォーマット生成 // confirmAndAutoTask, // 確定+タスク自動生成 // buildSlipHTML, // 明細HTML生成（テスト・カスタマイズ用） // }; // // ■ altruloop-v5.jsx 統合時の変更点（Part 1 から追加の1箇所のみ） // ClientScreen の tab スイッチを変更: // 旧: {tab === "payroll" && } // 新: {tab === "payroll" && } // ============================================================= // ── Part3 ── function calcSalaryDeduction(annualGross) { if (annualGross <= 1625000) return 550000; if (annualGross <= 1800000) return Math.floor(annualGross * 0.4) - 100000; if (annualGross <= 3600000) return Math.floor(annualGross * 0.3) + 80000; if (annualGross <= 6600000) return Math.floor(annualGross * 0.2) + 440000; if (annualGross <= 8500000) return Math.floor(annualGross * 0.1) + 1100000; return 1950000; // 上限 } /** * 基礎控除額（2020年改正後） */ function calcBasicDeduction(totalIncome) { if (totalIncome <= 24000000) return 480000; if (totalIncome <= 24500000) return 320000; if (totalIncome <= 25000000) return 160000; return 0; } /** * 配偶者控除額（配偶者の合計所得が48万円以下） */ function calcSpouseDeduction(taxpayerIncome, spouseIncome) { spouseIncome = spouseIncome || 0; if (spouseIncome > 480000) return 0; if (taxpayerIncome <= 9000000) return 380000; if (taxpayerIncome <= 9500000) return 260000; if (taxpayerIncome <= 10000000) return 130000; return 0; } /** * 扶養控除額（一般扶養：38万 / 特定扶養（19〜22歳）：63万 / 同居老親：58万） */ function calcDependentDeduction(dependents, specificDependents, elderlySameResidence) { dependents = dependents || 0; specificDependents = specificDependents || 0; elderlySameResidence = elderlySameResidence || 0; return dependents * 380000 + specificDependents * 630000 + elderlySameResidence * 580000; } /** * 生命保険料控除額（一般・介護・年金の合算上限12万） */ function calcLifeInsuranceDeduction(premium) { premium = premium || 0; if (premium <= 0) return 0; if (premium <= 20000) return premium; if (premium <= 40000) return Math.floor(premium / 2) + 10000; if (premium <= 80000) return Math.floor(premium / 4) + 20000; return 40000; // 新制度上限 } /** * 地震保険料控除額（上限5万） */ function calcEarthquakeDeduction(premium) { return Math.min(premium || 0, 50000); } /** * 住宅借入金等特別控除（ローン残高 × 0.7%、上限35万） */ function calcHousingLoanDeduction(loanBalance) { return Math.min(Math.floor((loanBalance || 0) * 0.007), 350000); } /** * 所得税速算表（課税所得に対する税額） */ function calcIncomeTaxFromTaxable(taxableIncome) { const table = [ [1950000, 0.05, 0], [3300000, 0.10, 97500], [6950000, 0.20, 427500], [9000000, 0.23, 636000], [18000000, 0.33, 1536000], [40000000, 0.40, 2796000], [Infinity, 0.45, 4796000], ]; for (const [limit, rate, deduct] of table) { if (taxableIncome <= limit) { return Math.floor(taxableIncome * rate - deduct); } } return 0; } /** * calcYearEndAdjustment — 1名分の年末調整を完全計算する * @param {object} employee - employeeList の1要素 * @param {Array} monthlyRecs - その年の payrollMonths[].records（従業員1名分） * @param {object} yearEndForm - 年末調整申告書の入力値 * @returns {object} 計算結果 */ function calcYearEndAdjustment(employee, monthlyRecs, yearEndForm) { const f = yearEndForm || {}; const tax = employee.tax || {}; const ins = employee.insurance || {}; // 年間給与収入の合算 const annualGross = monthlyRecs.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.grossPay || 0), 0); // 年間源泉徴収税額の合算（月次で徴収済みの所得税） const annualWithheld = monthlyRecs.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.incomeTax || 0), 0); // 給与所得控除 const salaryDeduction = calcSalaryDeduction(annualGross); // 給与所得 const salaryIncome = Math.max(0, annualGross - salaryDeduction); // 所得控除の計算 const basicDeduction = calcBasicDeduction(salaryIncome); const spouseDeduction = (tax.spouseDeduction || f.spouseDeduction) ? calcSpouseDeduction(salaryIncome, f.spouseIncome || 0) : 0; const dependentDeduction = calcDependentDeduction( Number(ins.dependents || f.dependents || 0), Number(f.specificDependents || 0), Number(f.elderlySameResidence || 0) ); const lifeInsDed = calcLifeInsuranceDeduction( Number(tax.lifeInsuranceDeduction || f.lifeInsuranceDeduction || 0) ); const eqDed = calcEarthquakeDeduction( Number(tax.earthquakeInsuranceDeduction || f.earthquakeInsuranceDeduction || 0) ); const disabledDed = (tax.disabilityDeduction || f.disabilityDeduction) ? 270000 : 0; // 年間社保控除（月次で納付した社保の合計） const annualSocialIns = monthlyRecs.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.healthIns || 0) + (r.pension || 0) + (r.empIns || 0), 0 ); // 課税所得 const totalDeductions = basicDeduction + spouseDeduction + dependentDeduction + lifeInsDed + eqDed + disabledDed + annualSocialIns; const taxableIncome = Math.max(0, salaryIncome - totalDeductions); // 年税額（速算表） const annualTaxBeforeHousing = calcIncomeTaxFromTaxable(taxableIncome); // 住宅ローン控除（税額から直接控除） const housingLoanDed = calcHousingLoanDeduction( Number(tax.housingLoanDeduction || f.housingLoanDeduction || 0) ); const annualTax = Math.max(0, annualTaxBeforeHousing - housingLoanDed); // 復興特別所得税（2.1%） const reconstructionTax = Math.floor(annualTax * 0.021); const finalTax = annualTax + reconstructionTax; // 過不足税額（マイナスなら還付、プラスなら追徴） const difference = finalTax - annualWithheld; const isRefund = difference < 0; return { annualGross, annualWithheld, salaryDeduction, salaryIncome, basicDeduction, spouseDeduction, dependentDeduction, lifeInsDed, eqDed, disabledDed, annualSocialIns, totalDeductions, taxableIncome, annualTaxBeforeHousing, housingLoanDed, annualTax, reconstructionTax, finalTax, difference, isRefund, refundAmount: isRefund ? -difference : 0, additionalTax: isRefund ? 0 : difference, }; } // ─── 2. 年末調整 申告フォームのデフォルト ───────────────────── function defaultYearEndForm() { return { // 配偶者 spouseDeduction: false, spouseIncome: 0, // 扶養 dependents: 0, // 一般扶養（16歳以上） specificDependents: 0, // 特定扶養（19〜22歳） elderlySameResidence: 0, // 同居老親（70歳以上） // 各種控除 lifeInsuranceDeduction: 0, earthquakeInsuranceDeduction: 0, housingLoanDeduction: 0, disabilityDeduction: false, // 収集ステータス formCollected: false, // 申告書回収済み formVerified: false, // 社労士確認済み confirmedAt: "", memo: "", }; } // ─── 3. 36協定アラート ───────────────────────────────────────── /** * calcOvertimeSummary — 当月・直近6ヶ月の残業状況を集計 * @param {Array} payrollMonths - client.payrollMonths * @param {Array} employeeList - client.employeeList * @param {string} currentYM - 対象月 "2026-03" */ function calcOvertimeSummary(payrollMonths, employeeList, currentYM) { const alerts = []; // 月次レコードから残業時間を取得 function getOtHours(empId, ym) { const m = payrollMonths.find(m => m.yearMonth === ym); if (!m) return 0; const r = (m.records || []).find(r => r.employeeId === empId); return r ? (Number(r.overtimeHours || 0) + Number(r.lateNightHours || 0) + Number(r.holidayHours || 0)) : 0; } // 直近6ヶ月の月リストを生成 function prevMonths(ym, count) { const [y, m] = ym.split("-").map(Number); const result = []; for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) { let nm = m - i, ny = y; while (nm <= 0) { nm += 12; ny--; } result.push(`${ny}-${String(nm).padStart(2, "0")}`); } return result; } const months6 = prevMonths(currentYM, 6); for (const emp of (employeeList || []).filter(e => e.status === "active")) { const currentOt = getOtHours(emp.id, currentYM); const avg6 = months6.reduce((s, ym) => s + getOtHours(emp.id, ym), 0) / 6; // 月45時間超（一般条項の上限） if (currentOt > 45) { alerts.push({ empId: emp.id, empName: emp.name, dept: emp.dept, type: "monthly_limit", level: currentOt > 80 ? "critical" : "high", message: `当月残業 ${currentOt}h — 月45時間超（一般条項上限）`, hours: currentOt, limit: 45, }); } // 6ヶ月平均80時間超（特別条項の上限） if (avg6 > 80) { alerts.push({ empId: emp.id, empName: emp.name, dept: emp.dept, type: "avg_limit", level: "critical", message: `6ヶ月平均 ${Math.round(avg6)}h — 特別条項80h/月超`, hours: Math.round(avg6), limit: 80, }); } } return alerts; } /** * OvertimeAlertBanner — 36協定アラートを TabPayrollV2 内で表示する * Props: client, yearMonth, records */ function OvertimeAlertBanner({ client, yearMonth, records }) { const alerts = calcOvertimeSummary( client.payrollMonths || [], client.employeeList || [], yearMonth ); // 当月レコードも考慮（まだ保存前の入力値） const liveAlerts = (client.employeeList || []) .filter(e => e.status === "active") .map(emp => { const rec = (records || []).find(r => r.employeeId === emp.id) || {}; const ot = (Number(rec.overtimeHours || 0) + Number(rec.lateNightHours || 0) + Number(rec.holidayHours || 0)); if (ot > 45) { return { empId: emp.id, empName: emp.name, dept: emp.dept, type: "monthly_live", level: ot > 80 ? "critical" : "high", message: `当月残業 ${ot}h — 月45時間超（一般条項上限）`, hours: ot, limit: 45, }; } return null; }) .filter(Boolean); // 重複を除去（same empId + type） const allAlerts = [...liveAlerts, ...alerts.filter(a => a.type !== "monthly_live")]; const unique = allAlerts.filter((a, i, arr) => arr.findIndex(b => b.empId === a.empId && b.type === a.type) === i ); if (unique.length === 0) return null; const hasCritical = unique.some(a => a.level === "critical"); return (
{hasCritical ? "🚨" : "⚠️"}
36協定 アラート — {unique.length}件
労働基準法 第36条
{unique.map((a, i) => (
{a.empName} {a.dept && {a.dept}} {a.message}
{a.level === "critical" ? "要対応" : "注意"}
))}
💡 特別条項の締結・届出状況を確認し、必要に応じて労働者への通知と記録を残してください。
); } // ─── 4. 年末調整タブ ────────────────────────────────────────── // ─── TabMynumber — マイナンバー管理 ────────────────────────────── function TabMynumber({ client: rawClient, updateClient, auth }) { const client = migratePlans(rawClient); const employees = (client.employeeList || []); const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,16).replace("T"," "); const [view, setView] = useState("list"); // "list" | "detail" const [selEmpId, setSelEmpId] = useState(null); const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(null); // mynumber entry to display const [search, setSearch] = useState(""); const [addModal, setAddModal] = useState(false); // 追加モーダル const [addForm, setAddForm] = useState({ relation:"本人", name:"", number:"" }); const selEmp = employees.find(e => e.id === selEmpId); function getMynumberData(emp) { return emp.mynumberData || []; } function updateMynumberData(empId, data) { updateClient(c => ({ ...c, employeeList: (c.employeeList||[]).map(e => e.id === empId ? { ...e, mynumberData: data, mynumberConfirmed: data.length > 0 } : e ) })); } function addEntry() { if (!addForm.name.trim() || !addForm.number.trim()) return; const current = getMynumberData(selEmp); const entry = { id: "mn" + Date.now(), relation: addForm.relation, name: addForm.name.trim(), number: addForm.number.trim(), status: "提供済み", updatedAt: today, }; updateMynumberData(selEmpId, [...current, entry]); setAddForm({ relation:"本人", name:"", number:"" }); setAddModal(false); } function deleteEntry(empId, entryId) { const current = getMynumberData(employees.find(e=>e.id===empId)); updateMynumberData(empId, current.filter(e => e.id !== entryId)); } // マスク表示 function maskNumber(num) { if (!num) return "—"; return num.replace(/\d/g, "※"); } const filtered = employees.filter(e => { if (!search) return true; return e.name.includes(search) || (e.nameKana||"").includes(search) || (e.employeeNo||"").includes(search); }); const INP = { background:"#FAFCFF", border:"1px solid #E2E8F0", borderRadius:7, padding:"7px 11px", color:"#1A1A2E", fontSize:12, fontFamily:"'Noto Sans JP'", outline:"none", width:"100%", boxSizing:"border-box", colorScheme:"light" }; const SEL = { ...INP, cursor:"pointer" }; // ── 個別詳細ビュー ── if (view === "detail" && selEmp) { const data = getMynumberData(selEmp); const registered = data.filter(d => d.status === "提供済み"); const pending = data.filter(d => d.status !== "提供済み"); return (
{/* 戻るリンク */} {/* タイトル */}
{selEmp.employeeNo && `${selEmp.employeeNo} `}{selEmp.name}さんのマイナンバー情報
従業員本人と家族のマイナンバーを管理できます。
{/* 従業員情報 */}
従業員情報
{[ ["社員番号", selEmp.employeeNo||"—", "氏名", selEmp.name, "雇用形態", selEmp.empType], ["部署", selEmp.dept||"—", "在籍状況", selEmp.status==="active"?"在籍":"退職", "入社年月日", selEmp.joinDate||"—"], ].map((row, ri) => (
{[0,2,4].map(i => (
{row[i]}
{row[i+1]}
))}
))}
{/* 登録済み */}
登録済み {registered.length}件
{["ステータス","続柄","氏名","マイナンバー","更新日時","操作"].map(h => (
{h}
))}
{registered.length === 0 ? (
登録済みのマイナンバーはありません
) : registered.map((entry, i) => (
{entry.status} {entry.relation} {entry.name} {maskNumber(entry.number)} {entry.updatedAt}
))}
{/* 未登録・作業中 */} {pending.length > 0 && (
登録作業中 {pending.length}件
{pending.map((entry, i) => (
{entry.status} {entry.relation} {entry.name} {entry.updatedAt}
))}
)} {/* 追加モーダル */} {addModal && (
マイナンバーを追加
setAddForm(p=>({...p,name:e.target.value}))} placeholder="山田 太郎" style={INP} />
setAddForm(p=>({...p,number:e.target.value}))} placeholder="1234 5678 9012" style={{ ...INP, fontFamily:"'DM Mono'", letterSpacing:"0.1em" }} maxLength={14} />
)} {/* 表示モーダル */} {showModal && (
setShowModal(null)}>
e.stopPropagation()}>
{selEmp.employeeNo && `${selEmp.employeeNo} `}{selEmp.name}さんの{showModal.relation}のマイナンバー情報
{/* 左 */}
対象者情報
対象者
{showModal.name}（{showModal.relation}）
従業員情報
{selEmp.employeeNo} {selEmp.name}
マイナンバー
{showModal.number.replace(/\s/g,"").match(/.{1,4}/g)?.map((chunk, i) => (
{chunk}
))}
マイナンバーの利用目的
{["健康保険・厚生年金保険関係届出事務","雇用保険関係届出事務","源泉徴収に関する事務"].map(p => (
・ {p}
))}
更新日時
{showModal.updatedAt}
{/* 右（確認書類エリア） */}
確認書類がありません。
)}
); } // ── 一覧ビュー ── return (
マイナンバー管理
従業員と家族のマイナンバーを管理できます。
{/* サマリ */}
{[ { l:"登録済み", v: employees.filter(e=>(e.mynumberData||[]).some(d=>d.status==="提供済み")).length, c:"#16A34A" }, { l:"未登録", v: employees.filter(e=>!(e.mynumberData||[]).length).length, c:"#D97706" }, { l:"対象者数", v: employees.filter(e=>e.status==="active"||e.status==="leave").length, c:"#2563EB" }, ].map(s => (
{s.l}
{s.v}
名
))}
{/* 検索 */}
setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="氏名・社員番号で検索…" style={{ background:"#F1F5F9", border:"1px solid #E2E8F0", borderRadius:8, padding:"7px 14px", color:"#1A1A2E", fontSize:12, fontFamily:"'Noto Sans JP'", outline:"none", width:"100%", boxSizing:"border-box", colorScheme:"light" }} />
{/* テーブルヘッダ */}
マイナンバー情報 在籍状況 入社年月日 退職年月日 登録済み 未登録
{/* 一覧 */}
{filtered.map(emp => { const data = getMynumberData(emp); const regCount = data.filter(d=>d.status==="提供済み").length; const unregCount = data.filter(d=>d.status!=="提供済み").length; const unregistered = data.length === 0; return (
{emp.status==="active"?"在籍中":emp.status==="retired"?"退職":"休職中"} {emp.joinDate||"—"} {emp.retireDate||emp.leaveDate||"—"} 0?"#16A34A":"#CBD5E1" }}> {regCount > 0 ? `提供済み ${regCount} ／ 提供拒否 0` : "未登録 0"} {unregistered ? "未登録 1" : "未登録 0"}
); })}
); } function TabYearEnd({ client: rawClient, updateClient, auth }) { const client = (typeof migratePlans === "function") ? migratePlans(rawClient) : rawClient; const [view, setView] = useState("list"); // "list" | "detail" const [selEmpId, setSelEmpId] = useState(null); const [selYear, setSelYear] = useState("2025"); const [toast, setToast] = useState(null); const employees = (client.employeeList || []).filter(e => e.status === "active" || e.status === "leave"); // 年末調整データは client.yearEndAdj[year][empId] に格納 // 統合時: migrateClient に yearEndAdj: c.yearEndAdj || {} を追加 const yearEndAdj = (client.yearEndAdj || {})[selYear] || {}; function getForm(empId) { return yearEndAdj[empId] || defaultYearEndForm(); } function saveForm(empId, patch) { updateClient(c => ({ ...c, yearEndAdj: { ...(c.yearEndAdj || {}), [selYear]: { ...(((c.yearEndAdj || {})[selYear]) || {}), [empId]: { ...(((c.yearEndAdj || {})[selYear] || {})[empId] || defaultYearEndForm()), ...patch }, }, }, })); } // 対象年の月次レコードを集める function getMonthlyResults(empId) { const pms = (client.payrollMonths || []).filter(m => m.yearMonth.startsWith(selYear)); return pms.flatMap(pm => { const rec = (pm.records || []).find(r => r.employeeId === empId); if (!rec) return []; const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === empId); if (!emp) return []; // 計算済みの場合はそのまま使う、なければ再計算 if (rec.grossPay !== undefined && rec.incomeTax !== undefined && rec.healthIns !== undefined) { return [rec]; } // calcPayroll を使えるか確認 if (typeof calcPayroll === "function") { return [calcPayroll(emp, rec, Number(emp.residentTax || 0))]; } return []; }); } // 収集状況サマリ const collected = employees.filter(e => getForm(e.id).formCollected).length; const verified = employees.filter(e => getForm(e.id).formVerified).length; const done = employees.filter(e => { const f = getForm(e.id); return f.formVerified && f.confirmedAt; }).length; const STEPS = [ { id: "collect", label: "申告書収集", n: collected, total: employees.length, c: "#3B82F6" }, { id: "verify", label: "社労士確認", n: verified, total: employees.length, c: "#64748B" }, { id: "confirm", label: "税額確定", n: done, total: employees.length, c: "#16A34A" }, ]; // ── 詳細ビュー ── if (view === "detail" && selEmpId) { const emp = employees.find(e => e.id === selEmpId); if (!emp) { setView("list"); return null; } const form = getForm(selEmpId); const mRecs = getMonthlyResults(selEmpId); const canCalc = mRecs.length > 0; const result = canCalc ? calcYearEndAdjustment(emp, mRecs, form) : null; return (
年末調整 — {emp.name}
{selYear}年分 · {emp.dept} · {emp.empType}
{/* 左カラム：申告書入力 */}
申告書入力
{/* 収集・確認フラグ */}
{[ ["formCollected", "申告書 回収済み", "#DCFCE7", "#16A34A"], ["formVerified", "社労士 確認済み", "#EFF6FF", "#2563EB"], ].map(([k, l, bg, c]) => (
saveForm(selEmpId, { [k]: !form[k] })} style={{ flex: 1, padding: "9px 12px", borderRadius: 8, border: `1px solid ${form[k] ? c + "60" : "#FFFFFF"}`, background: form[k] ? bg : "#F8F9FA", cursor: "pointer" }}>
{form[k] && ✓}
{l}
))}
{/* 配偶者控除 */}
配偶者控除
saveForm(selEmpId, { spouseDeduction: !form.spouseDeduction })} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, marginBottom: 8, cursor: "pointer" }}>
{form.spouseDeduction && ✓}
配偶者控除あり
{form.spouseDeduction && (
saveForm(selEmpId, { spouseIncome: +e.target.value })} placeholder="0（48万円超は控除なし）" style={{ background:"#FAFCFF", border:"1px solid #E2E8F0", borderRadius:7, padding:"6px 10px", color:"#1A1A2E", fontSize:12, outline:"none", width:"100%", boxSizing:"border-box", colorScheme:"light" }} />
)}
{/* 扶養控除 */}
扶養控除
{[ ["dependents", "一般扶養（16歳以上）", "38万"], ["specificDependents", "特定扶養（19〜22歳）", "63万"], ["elderlySameResidence","同居老親（70歳以上）", "58万"], ].map(([k, l, amt]) => (
saveForm(selEmpId, { [k]: +e.target.value })} style={{ background:"#FAFCFF", border:"1px solid #E2E8F0", borderRadius:7, padding:"5px 8px", color:"#1A1A2E", fontSize:12, outline:"none", width:"100%", boxSizing:"border-box", colorScheme:"light", textAlign:"center" }} />
))}
{/* 各種控除 */}
各種控除（年額）
{[ ["lifeInsuranceDeduction", "生命保険料控除", "上限12万"], ["earthquakeInsuranceDeduction", "地震保険料控除", "上限5万"], ["housingLoanDeduction", "住宅ローン残高", "×0.7%が控除"], ].map(([k, l, hint]) => (
saveForm(selEmpId, { [k]: +e.target.value })} placeholder="0" style={{ background:"#FAFCFF", border:"1px solid #E2E8F0", borderRadius:7, padding:"6px 10px", color:"#1A1A2E", fontSize:12, outline:"none", width:"100%", boxSizing:"border-box", colorScheme:"light" }} />
))}
{/* 障害者控除 */}
saveForm(selEmpId, { disabilityDeduction: !form.disabilityDeduction })} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, padding: "9px 14px", borderRadius: 8, border: `1px solid ${form.disabilityDeduction ? "rgba(167,139,250,0.4)" : "#F1F5F9"}`, background: form.disabilityDeduction ? "#F1F5F9" : "#F8F9FA", cursor: "pointer" }}>
{form.disabilityDeduction && ✓}
障害者控除あり（27万）
{/* メモ */}
